message:
test(proptest): add property tests for disaster recovery drills and lock orchestration

Two new proptest suites covering critical infrastructure modules with
randomized inputs.

proptest_disaster_recovery_drills.rs (515 lines):
- Serde roundtrips for all drill domain types
- RTO/RPO target evaluation under varied timing configurations
- DrillVerdict algebra: pass/fail/skip composition invariants
- DrillMetrics arithmetic: counter overflow handling, aggregation
- DrillRunner execution invariants under arbitrary drill sequences
- ContinuityReport health aggregation: worst-case propagation

proptest_lock_orchestration.rs (631 lines):
- Serde roundtrips for serializable lock types
- LockEntry expiry logic under arbitrary clock values
- LockOrchestrator acquire/release: single and concurrent patterns
- Group lock semantics: all-or-nothing acquisition
- Lock handoff: ownership transfer preserves invariants
- Telemetry consistency: counters match actual operations
- ResourceId invariants: uniqueness, format stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
